_meta.purpose: Local mirror of the TicketSpice 'Actions' tab (conditional show/hide/price logic) for THIS page. One actions file per TicketSpice page, sibling to the page HTML.
_meta.sync_protocol: Mat is the source of truth on the live TicketSpice page. When he adds/edits/removes an Action there, he reports it and Crowdly updates this file to match. Crowdly never invents an Action Mat hasn't confirmed live.
changelog: 2026-06-08 (initial): captured 49 actions from the TicketSpice Actions-tab screenshot PDF.

2026-06-08 (peach go-live prep): Mat DELETED 'hide-fieldaccess-after-may25' on the live page to open the general Field Access pass for peach season (PYO peaches opens Jun 12). Field Access now shows via the summer window show-rules and is hidden again after Sep 5 by the fall changeover rules (show-weekday-fall-after-sep5 / show-weekend-fall-after-sep5 hide_also lists). Per 6/5 Eckert's check-in w/ Amanda. Sunflower stays hidden (moving to a standalone Sunflower Festival) and the 2025-dated blackberry show-rule is left as-is pending Amanda's blackberry gate date. Net: 49 -> 48 actions. OPEN GAP: no Peach Fun Pass ($16 online/$20 box office) exists in the actions — confirm whether the ticket type exists on the live page before the 6/11 cut-over.

field_guide.match: 'any' (When Any...) = OR across conditions; 'all' (When All...) = AND across conditions

fields.Ticket Date Selection: the date the BUYER picks (the visit date) — drives nearly all seasonal show/hide logic
fields.Date: the live SUBMISSION date (today) — drives time-based teardowns relative to now
fields.Purchase Date: purchase-date condition scoped to a specific ticket type (named in the condition value's _ticket)

field_guide.operators: date-is | date-is-before | date-is-after | date-is-between (value = [start, end]) | day-of-week-is (value = list of weekdays)
field_guide.enabled: true if currently active on the live page

actions.notes: Weekday spring/summer window. Includes Monday in the weekday list but the farm is closed Mondays — backstopped by hide-all-monday-closed.
